name: Glxlimited
notes: Site returned ECONNREFUSED. Multiple GLX companies exist (GLX Group Limited in Norwich UK, GLX Digital in Australia, GLX Technologies in Texas) — none definitively tied to glxlimited.com. Cannot confirm identity or location.

name: Kkp Group
notes: KKP Group LLC is a single-family office (Lehman Family Group) at 1603 Orrington Ave, Evanston, IL 60201. Managing Partner: Kenneth Lehman.

name: Tiplatform
notes: TI Platform Management (now Transpose Platform Management), SEC-registered VC platform founded 2015 by Alex Bangash and Trang T. Nguyen. Headquartered in San Francisco, CA.

name: Archway
notes: Archway Marketing Services — marketing logistics and fulfillment company at 19850 S Diamond Lk Rd, Rogers, MN 55374. archway.zendesk.com is their customer support subdomain; canonical site is archway.com.

name: Vpcadvisors
notes: Victory Park Capital Advisors — private credit and alternative investment firm at 150 N Riverside Plaza, Suite 5200, Chicago, IL 60606. vpcadvisors.com redirects to victoryparkcapital.com.

name: Gtlaw
notes: Greenberg Traurig, LLP — multinational law firm founded 1967 in Miami, FL. Largest office is NYC but Miami is the founding/HQ city. 3,100+ attorneys across 51+ offices worldwide.

name: Denucci
notes: denucci.net returned empty content. Denucci Constructors LLC (Austin, TX) uses denucciconstructors.com — not this domain. Cannot identify the company at denucci.net with confidence.

name: Greystreet
notes: Grey Street Capital LLC — investment management firm founded 2017 at 150 N Riverside Plaza, Suite 1930, Chicago, IL 60606.

name: Ode Llc
notes: Ode LLC — investment/brokerage firm at 144 Green Bay Rd Fl 2, Winnetka, IL. In business since 1999.

name: Renegade Partners
notes: Renegade Partners — early-stage VC firm co-founded in 2018/2020 by Renata Quintini and Roseanne Wincek. Based in San Francisco, CA. Focuses on Series A with select Seed and Series B.

name: Western Tech
notes: Western Technology Investment — VC/debt lender founded 1980 at 104 Ln Mesa Dr, Portola Valley, CA 94028. Has provided $6B+ in capital to tech and life science companies.

name: Ayco
notes: The Ayco Company, L.P. (now Goldman Sachs Ayco Personal Financial Management) — fee-based financial counseling at 100 Coliseum Drive, Cohoes, NY. Founded 1971, acquired by Goldman Sachs in 2003.
